REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/18/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $657.76 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TOLBERT, TERRENCE LA SHAUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT TERRENCE LA SHAUN TOLBERT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOLBERT, TERRENCE LA SHAUN $549.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.76 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $724.76, $535.00 PRINCIPAL AND $14.00 LATE FEES PLUS INTEREST ON PRINCIPAL BALANCE ONLY FROM 4/28/2018 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
